news.headline: Mach Natural Resources LP releases 2023 Schedule K-3 for international tax matters, available online for unitholders.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City, Mach Natural Resources LP (NYSE: MNR) has released its 2023 Schedule K-3s online for unitholders needing international tax information. The documents can be accessed at www.taxpackagesupport.com/mnr. This offering is particularly pertinent for foreign unitholders, individuals claiming a foreign tax credit on their tax filings, and specific corporate or partnership entities. The availability of these Schedule K-3s is significant for those seeking tax-relevant details, with a focus on international matters.

news.headline: SCOTUS rulings restrict SEC's authority on crypto with conservative members supporting two critical opinions, impacting federal agency law enforcement.
news.summary: Two conservative judges on the U.S. Supreme Court supported two majority decisions with significant implications for federal agencies ability to enforce laws.

news.headline: John Hancock closed-end funds announce monthly distributions: Declaration Date July 1, 2024; Payment Date July 31, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the John Hancock closed-end funds announced their monthly distributions. The Declaration Date was July 1, 2024, with an Ex Date of July 11, 2024, Record Date of July 11, 2024, and Payment Date of July 31, 2024. The distribution per share for each fund, listed by ticker and name, was disclosed.

news.headline: Investment giant BlackRock makes a substantial investment in private assets with Preqin, according to reports.
Kilroy Realty (NYSE: KRC) to release Q2 2024 results on July 31st, with conference call on August 1st at 10am PT/1pm ET. Register online for details.
news.summary: Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) will unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, July 31, 2024, after the closing of the market. Following this, a conference call is scheduled for Thursday, August 1, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET, during which the results will be discussed. For those interested in participating and accessing the dial-in information for the conference call, registration can be completed via the provided link: https://www.netroadshow.com/events/login?show=f15f60b2&confId=58185.

news.headline: Kearney signs 27,866 sq ft lease for Empire State Building's top floors. Marks 100-year anniversary.
news.summary: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESRT) disclosed a recent lease agreement with Kearney, a global management consulting firm, involving a 27,866 square foot duplex on the top two office floors at the Empire State Building (ESB), renowned as the “World’s Most Famous Building.” The lead partner of Kearney’s New York office, Candice Yee, expressed pride in choosing the Empire State Building as their New York team’s base. This move coincides with Kearney celebrating its 100-year anniversary.

news.headline: Champion Homes wins 2 design awards from MHI for 2024, totaling 24 awards in recent years.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, Champion Homes has received the Excellence in Manufactured Housing Award from the Manufactured Housing Institute (MHI) for the tenth consecutive year. Champion Homes was recognized in two categories: Modular Housing Design and Manufactured Home Design - CrossMod®. With these latest accolades, Champion Homes has now won a total of 24 design awards in recent years. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to great design and execution, showcasing the outstanding teamwork that contributes to their success.

news.headline: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) to release 2nd quarter 2024 earnings on July 31, 2024, with conference call on Aug 1 at 1:00 PM ET. Replay available.
news.summary: A real estate investment trust company, AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB), based in Arlington, Virginia, is set to announce its second-quarter 2024 earnings on July 31, 2024, after the market closes. Subsequently, a conference call will be held on August 1, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Time (ET) to delve into the results. For those interested in tuning in, the live call can be accessed domestically at (877) 407-9716, internationally at (201) 493-6779, or via webcast at https://investors.avalonbay.com. Additionally, for those who miss the initial call, a replay will be available domestically at (844) 512XXXX.

news.headline: Solid Biosciences granted 11,847 restricted stock units to a new employee as an inducement.
news.summary: In Charlestown, Massachusetts, a life sciences company, Solid Biosciences Inc. (Nasdaq: SLDB), revealed that they have granted 11,847 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a recently recruited employee. This organization focuses on developing precision genetic medicines for neuromuscular and cardiac disorders.

news.headline: Sensata Technologies adds Phillip Eyler to Board of Directors on April 29, 2024. Eyler brings 30+ years industry experience.
news.summary: Sensata Technologies Holding plc made an announcement that Phillip Eyler has recently joined its Board of Directors, as of April 29, 2024. Eyler, who possesses over 30 years of experience in engineering, operations, and business within the automotive sector, will be part of the CEO Search Committee and the Nominating and Governance Committee starting from July 1, 2024. This move aims to enhance the expertise within Sensata’s leadership, as the company continues to strengthen its position in the industry.Character count: 382

news.headline: Belden (NYSE: BDC) completes acquisition of Precision Optical Technologies, aiming to expand solutions in Enterprise and broadband markets.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC) has finalized the acquisition of Precision Optical Technologies, Inc. The CEO, Dr. Chand, expressed enthusiasm about integrating the Precision Optical Technologies team into Belden. This strategic move aims to leverage Precision Optical Technologies’ foothold in the optical transceiver sector to enhance Belden's presence in the Enterprise Solutions and broadband markets. This acquisition marks a significant step for Belden as it continues to expand its solutions portfolio and drive growth in key segments.

news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. will report Q2 2024 financial results on August 1, 2024, with a conference call at 8:30 AM Eastern Time.
news.summary: Uniti Group Inc., based in Little Rock, Arkansas, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 before Nasdaq Stock Exchange trading commences on August 1, 2024. The company, listed as UNIT on Nasdaq, will host a conference call at 8:30 AM Eastern Time on the same day to analyze the earnings report.

news.headline: Apollo Senior Floating Rate Fund Inc. (AFT) & Apollo Tactical Income Fund Inc. (AIF) declare pre-merger distributions to stockholders. Mergers with MidCap Financial Investment Corp (MFIC) expected to close in late July. Pre-merger distributions to fully distribute accumulated undistributed net investment income.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Apollo Senior Floating Rate Fund Inc. (NYSE: AFT) and Apollo Tactical Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: AIF) have announced pre-merger distributions for their stockholders before merging with MidCap Financial Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: MFIC). The mergers, anticipated to finalize in late July pending standard closing conditions, were approved by stockholders. The purpose of the pre-merger distributions is to distribute AFT’s and AIF’s accumulated undistributed net investment income. The specific distribution dates and amounts will be provided to stockholders in preparation for the upcoming mergers.

news.headline: UMH Properties, Inc. declares $0.215 quarterly dividend per share for Common Stock on July 1, 2024. Annual dividend rate: $0.86.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE:UMH) (TASE:UMH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.215 per share for its Common Stock. This dividend will be payable on September 16, 2024, to shareholders of record as of August 15, 2024. The annual dividend rate on the Company's Common Stock stands at $0.86 per share.

news.headline: Apollo Senior Floating Rate Fund Inc. and Apollo Tactical Income Fund Inc. have declared pre-merger distributions to stockholders, expected to close in late July with MidCap Financial Investment Corporation. Previous approvals were received, with specific distribution details provided.
news.summary: In New York on July 01, 2024, Apollo Senior Floating Rate Fund Inc. (NYSE: AFT) and Apollo Tactical Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: AIF) have announced pre-merger distributions for their shareholders. The mergers with MidCap Financial Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: MFIC) that were approved by the stockholders are expected to finalize in late July, pending standard closing conditions. The distributions aim to fully disburse the accumulated undistributed net investment income of AFT and AIF before the merger with MFIC. The specific distribution dates and amounts are outlined below.

news.headline: Vireo Growth Inc changes name from Goodness Growth Holdings.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 3,500 individuals were affected by the recent data breach. This incident involved the unauthorized access of personal information, including names, addresses, and payment details. The company has stated that they are working diligently to address the issue and have informed all impacted customers. The breach is currently under investigation by cybersecurity experts, and measures are being taken to prevent such incidents in the future.Affected individuals are advised to monitor their accounts and report any suspicious activity.

news.headline: Lakeside Holding Limited closes upsized $6.75 million IPO, selling 1.5 million shares at $4.50 each. Strategic focus on Asian market.
news.summary: Itasca, Illinois - Lakeside Holding Limited, a U.S.-based cross-border supply chain solution provider with a focus on the Asian market, has successfully closed its initial public offering. The Offering involved 1,500,000 shares of common stock priced at $4.50 each, resulting in total gross proceeds of $6.75 million for the Company, before deductions for underwriting discounts and offering expenses. Lakeside's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol LSH.

news.headline: FinWise Bancorp to host Q2 2024 webcast and call on July 25; parent company of FinWise Bank (NASDAQ: FINW).
news.summary: FinWise Bancorp, the parent company of FinWise Bank and traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FINW, will be releasing its second quarter financial results on July 25, 2024, following the close of the market. They will also be conducting a webcast and conference call to discuss these results.

news.headline: U.S. Energy Corp. acquires Wavetech Helium Inc for helium production targeting Kevin Dome structure in Montana, plans to acquire 164,000 net acres.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, U.S. Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: USEG) finalized a deal with Wavetech Helium Inc for the acquisition of operated acreage aimed at helium production within the Kevin Dome structure in Toole County, Montana. This acquisition, referred to as the WT Asset, encompasses a significant portion of land. Additionally, U.S. Energy has entered into a non-binding letter of intent with Synergy Offshore, LLC to obtain offsetting operated acreage, known as the SOG Asset. The combined acreage now forms a contiguous position across the Kevin Dome, totaling approximately 164,000 net acres for U.S. Energy.

news.headline: CubeSmart to release Q2 2024 financial results on August 1, 2024, after market close. Conference call on August 2 at 11:00 a.m ET.
news.summary: CubeSmart, a real estate investment trust listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol CUBE, disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2024. The announcement is set to occur post-market closure on August 1, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the following day, August 2, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Participants can expect vital insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. confirms July 2024 dividends for Common Stock and Series C Preferred Stock.
news.summary: In VERO BEACH, Florida, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC) announced the July 2024 cash dividend for its Common Stock, in line with the guidance from June 24, 2024. The Q3 2024 monthly cash dividend rate for the Company's Series C Preferred Stock was also confirmed.

news.headline: J & J Snack Foods Corp (NASDAQ: JJSF) plans Q3 earnings call on Aug 6, 2024, 10:00 am EST.
news.summary: A company based in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, J & J Snack Foods Corp. (NASDAQ: JJSF), disclosed plans for a conference call and webcast to address its fiscal 2024 Q3 financial performance. The event is set to take place on Tuesday, August 6, 2024, starting at 10:00 am Eastern time. Participants can join to delve into the details surrounding the company's quarterly results during this scheduled communication session.

news.headline: Caesars Entertainment appoints Rodney Williams to the Board of Directors, effective July 1, 2024. (Numbers: NASDAQ: CZR)
news.summary: In a recent statement, Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: CZR) revealed the selection of Rodney Williams to join its Board of Directors, starting on July 1, 2024, pending necessary regulatory clearances and licensing. Williams, known for his success in enhancing luxury brands, strategic marketing, and executive roles, is anticipated to offer a fresh and progressive outlook to the board. His appointment is set to diversify the expertise available within the Caesars Entertainment leadership.

news.headline: National Vision appoints Mark Banner as Chief Stores Officer, effective July 8, 2024. He joins after 7 years at Sleep Number.
news.summary: National Vision Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EYE) based in Duluth, Georgia, has appointed Mark Banner as the new Chief Stores Officer, starting on July 8, 2024. Banner, a veteran specialist in retail, previously spent seven years at Sleep Number, where he worked as the senior vice president of retail and real estate. His broad expertise covers managing teams in various areas such as sales, sales operations, digital, and promotion. This move signifies National Vision's strategic decision to bring in seasoned talent to drive growth and enhance their operational capabilities.

news.headline: Perfect Moment Ltd. reported fiscal year 2024 results, including total net revenue at a record $24.4 million, and eCommerce sales up 21% to $10.4 million.
news.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd., a leading skiwear and lifestyle brand traded on NYSE American under the ticker PMNT, recently released their financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2024. Total net revenue for the year reached an all-time high of $24.4 million, marking a 4% increase from the previous year. Notably, eCommerce sales saw substantial growth, surging by 21% to hit a record $10.4 million. Additionally, the company reported a 40 basis point increase in gross profit. This reflects Perfect Moment's successful blend of technical expertise and fashion-forward designs, solidifying its position in the high-performance luxury market.

news.headline: Regional Management Corp (NYSE: RM) to report Q2 2024 results on July 31, 2024, with conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: Regional Management Corp., a consumer finance company (NYSE: RM), will release its Q2 2024 results on July 31, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call to discuss the results is scheduled at 5:00 PM ET on the same day. The call can be accessed at (877) 407-075, and a live webcast will be streamed on Regional Management’s website, www.RegionalManagement.com.

news.headline: Kate Sampson appointed as new Independent Director at Selective Insurance Group, Inc. Brings 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: With a wealth of over 25 years of industry experience in insurance, risk management, and technology, Kate Sampson has been appointed to the Board of Directors of Selective Insurance Group, Inc. The announcement was made on July 1, 2024. Selective Insurance Group, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIGI.

news.headline: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) to release 2nd quarter results on July 23, 2024, hosting conference call the following day.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Pittsburgh, EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) announced its intention to release its financial and operating results for the second quarter after the market closes on Tuesday, July 23, 2024. The company is scheduled to hold a conference call on Wednesday to discuss the results and other important topics.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines makes executive changes: Fred Cromer as CFO, Dana Alviene as SVP, Tomas Ranaldi as VP.
news.summary: Spirit Airlines has announced the appointment of Fred Cromer, an experienced figure in the aviation industry, as their Chief Financial Officer. Alongside this, Dana Shapir Alviene has been named Senior Vice President of Inflight and Airport Experience, while Tomas Ranaldi has been promoted to Vice President of Financial Planning & Analysis. These changes were made effective on July 1, 2024. Dania Beach-based Spirit Airlines, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker symbol SAVE, continues to make strategic moves in key positions within the company.

news.headline: Group 1 Automotive acquires four Mercedes-Benz dealerships in the U.K., expanding its operations to a total of 206 dealerships.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Group 1 Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: GPI), a leading automotive retailer listed in the Fortune 300, shared plans for growth. The Company, known for its 206 dealerships across the U.S. and U.K., revealed its intention to bolster its U.K. presence through the procurement of four Mercedes-Benz...

news.headline: Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG) declares quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on July 29, 2024.
news.summary: In Seguin, Texas on July 1, 2024, Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share. The dividend is set to be distributed on July 29, 2024, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on July 16, 2024.

news.headline: Report: Apple's Vision Pro integrating AI intelligence separately from iPhones & Macs, per Bloomberg.
news.summary: Apple's advanced AI technology is expected to be integrated into spatial computing devices in the near future. However, this development will not coincide with the release of iPhones and Macs, as reported by Bloomberg. This indicates a strategic move by Apple to enhance the capabilities of their spatial computing technology separately from their existing product lines. The integration of AI into these devices will likely greatly improve user experience and functionality.

news.headline: Sun Communities, Inc. will release Q2 2024 results on July 31, 2024, with a conference call on August 1, 2024, at 2:00 P.M. ET.
news.summary: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI), a real estate investment trust, will be sharing its second quarter 2024 operating results after the market closes on July 31, 2024. Following this, on August 1, 2024, at 2:00 P.M. ET, the Company has scheduled a conference call to delve into these results. Sun Communities is known for its ownership and management of manufactured housing, recreational vehicle communities, and marinas.

news.headline: In June, nearly 3 in 4 voters see Biden as too old for re-election, with his approval at the lowest since July 2022.
news.summary: In data released on July 1, 2024, Stagwell revealed that President Biden's approval rating hit its lowest point since July 2022 in the latest June Harvard CAPS/Harris poll. This decline coincides with a worsening perception of the economy among the public. The poll, a regular joint effort between the Center for American Political Studies and Stagwell, highlights a significant downturn in sentiment towards the President as economic concerns escalate. These latest findings underscore the challenges facing the current administration as they navigate a complex economic landscape.

news.headline: Agnes Pelton's "Flowering" to be unveiled at Moran's sale on August 13, 2024. Collectors excited over fresh painting.
news.summary: On Tuesday, August 13th, 2024 at 12:00pm PDT in Los Angeles, news broke that Moran's Art + Design sale scheduled for July 1, 2024, is creating a lot of excitement among collectors. The sale will showcase a newly found painting by the American Modernist, Agnes Pelton. The painting is fresh to the market and has sparked a lot of buzz.

news.headline: Global nail care products market to grow by USD 5.96 billion from 2024-2028, fueled by non-toxic solutions, reports Technavio.
news.summary: In New York as of July 1, 2024, it has been reported that the global market for nail care products is projected to experience a significant increase, with an estimated growth of USD 5.96 billion expected from 2024 to 2028, as outlined by Technavio. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.3% throughout the forecast period. This growth is attributed to the availability of non-toxic options for nail care within the market.

news.headline: Leafguard® acquires branch of BELDON Roofing in San Antonio, Texas, expanding to 19 counties in Texas. Great Day Improvements now has 280 locations in 120 markets.
news.summary: In East Brunswick, New Jersey, Leafguard® has acquired a new branch in San Antonio, Texas, from BELDON Roofing Company. This strategic move will enable Leafguard® to extend its services to cover 19 counties in Texas. Leafguard® and Englert®, part of Great Day Improvements, LLC since their acquisition in June 2024, have significantly expanded the company's operations. With this purchase, Great Day Improvements now operates in 280 locations across 120 markets, providing homeowners with improved access to their products and services.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) announces Eddy Kleid as President of Central Georgia Division, supporting company growth.
news.summary: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) has revealed key leadership changes to bolster its growth and success. Eddy Kleid, who has been with the company since 2017 as VP of Finance, will now serve as Division President for the Central Georgia Division. This marks a significant milestone in the company's expansion efforts. Under Eddy's guidance, the finance team has experienced substantial growth, contributing to the overall success of Smith Douglas Homes Corp.

news.headline: AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI) to announce Q2 2024 earnings on Aug. 1, 2024, followed by conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT. Access at (800) 715-9871 (passcode 4378083) or online at www.axt.com.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), a prominent manufacturer of compound semiconductor substrates, is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 through a press release immediately after the market closes on August 1, 2024. Furthermore, the company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT to delve into these results. The conference call can be joined by dialing (800) 715-9871 with the passcode 4378083, and will also be broadcasted live on www.axt.com. For those unable to participate, recordings will be available for later access.

news.headline: Global consulting firm RGP acquires Reference Point, expands financial services consulting.
news.summary: RGP, a worldwide consulting firm based in Irvine, California, recently completed the acquisition of Reference Point. This move marks a significant expansion of RGP's consulting services within the financial services sector.

news.headline: Domo's "Data Never Sleeps" infographic wins 2024 Communicator Award, tracking global data usage with increases across online platforms.
news.summary: Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) from Silicon Slopes, Utah, has announced that its annual “Data Never Sleeps” infographic has won in the Academy of Interactive and Visual Arts (AIVA)’s Communicator Awards for the second year in a row. The “Data Never Sleeps” infographic has been monitoring global data usage minute by minute for over ten years, showing significant growth in activity on platforms like Instagram, X, Amazon, Venmo, and more. This annual infographic sheds light on the increasing online activity across various platforms.

news.headline: Logitech proposes board changes, shareholders asked to elect 3 new members: Donald Allan, Owen Mahoney, Hanneke Faber.
news.summary: Logitech International, a global technology company listed on SIX and Nasdaq as LOGN and LOGI, respectively, has revealed plans to propose new board members to shareholders. The board is set to request the election of Donald Allan, current president and chief executive officer of Stanley Black & Decker, Inc., Owen Mahoney, ex-president and CEO of Nexon Co., Ltd., and Hanneke Faber, the CEO of Logitech. This decision reflects the company's commitment to enhancing board leadership and governance.

news.headline: Blend (NYSE: BLND) listed in 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Digital Banking Platforms, known for Builder Platform agility.
news.summary: San Francisco-based company Blend, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BLND, has been acknowledged in the 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Digital Banking Platforms. Their Builder Platform, known for its agility, aims to provide innovative banking products quickly and efficiently by utilizing reusable components and top-notch workflows to offer unique borrower experiences. This recognition solidifies Blend's position as a key player in the cloud banking services sector.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. released its monthly portfolio update as of May 31, 2024, including top 10 fixed-income holdings.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AWF] disclosed its monthly portfolio update as of May 31, 2024. The Fund’s top 10 fixed-income holdings by portfolio percentage included U.S. Treasury Notes and other assets. The update provides investors with insights into the Fund's investment allocation as of the specified date, helping them track the Fund's performance and strategy.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AFB] released May 31, 2024, portfolio update, including top 10 holdings.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. announced its latest monthly portfolio update. As of May 31, 2024, the Fund's top 10 fixed-income holdings included Lamar with a portfolio percentage of 1.00. The Fund, listed under NYSE as AFB, continues to monitor and adjust its investment holdings in the municipal income sector. The update provides interested parties with insights into the Fund's investment strategies and performance metrics.

news.headline: Grid Dynamics (Nasdaq: GDYN) will discuss Q2 2024 financial results in a conference call on August 1 at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: In San Ramon, California, Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN) revealed plans for a video conference at 4:30 p.m. ET on Thursday, August 1, 2024, to delve into their second quarter 2024 financial performance. Prior to the virtual meeting, a press release with detailed results will be circulated. The webcast can be viewed on the Investor Relations section of their website. Grid Dynamics is recognized for its enterprise-level digital transformation services and solutions, positioning itself as a frontrunner in this sector.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announces distribution rates: $0.0655 per share for AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the latest distributions from the AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds were announced as follows: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF) declared a distribution of $0.0655 per share. The ex-date for this distribution is set for July 11, 2024, with the record date being the same. Shareholders can expect payment to be made on July 26, 2024.

news.headline: Verisign's Q2 2024 financial results to be reported on July 25, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. (EDT) with news release at 4:05 p.m.
news.summary: VeriSign, a leading provider of internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, will hold its second-quarter earnings call on July 25, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. The earnings news release will be sent to wire services at around 4:05 p.m. EDT on the same day and will be accessible on VeriSign's website at https://investor.verisign.com. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol VRSN.

news.headline: iLearningEngines (NASDAQ: AILE) joins Russell 3000® Index with other related indexes on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Bethesda, Maryland, iLearningEngines, Inc. (NASDAQ: AILE) disclosed that it has become a part of the broad-market Russell 3000® Index and other related indexes. iLearningEngines, a frontrunner in AI-driven learning and work automation, confirmed this development as trading commenced on the mentioned date.

news.headline: Y-mAbs appoints Peter Pfreundschuh as CFO on June 28, 2024, focusing on cancer treatment products. Gazetted on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1st, 2024, Y-mAbs Therapeutics, Inc. declared Peter Pfreundschuh as the new Chief Financial Officer. Y-mAbs is a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol YMAB, specializing in innovative radioimmunotherapy and antibody-based cancer treatments. The appointment of Mr. Pfreundschuh, effective from June 28, 2024, positions him as a direct report to Mike Rossi, who serves as the President and Chief Executive Officer of the company.
